summary: Frontend-only verification of the new 'Fiyatsız Olarak İndir' (priceless PDF download) feature on the quote view page. All 6 acceptance steps passed end-to-end against the preview URL. Login admin@arigastro.com/admin123 -> /. Navigated to /teklifler, picked first existing quote id=6bb51376-3fd7-4430-8b60-e30f3c5879c7 (Angebot GM-202606-0002, Esra Butik, 1 line item 'Özel Kalem', total €119). On /teklifler/<id> both buttons rendered correctly: [data-testid=download-pdf-btn] (label 'PDF herunterladen') and [data-testid=download-priceless-pdf-btn] (label 'Ohne Preise herunterladen') -- DE default UI. VISIBLE template (#quote-pdf-root) has 7 table headers ['#','Bild','Produkt','Menge','Einzelpreis','Rab.%','Betrag'], contains 'Gesamtbetrag' block, validity line 'Gültig bis' and notes, all as expected. HIDDEN priceless template (#quote-pdf-root-priceless) exists off-screen (position absolute left -99999px), has only 4 table headers ['#','Bild','Produkt','Menge'] (correctly stripped Einzelpreis/Rab.%/Betrag), does NOT contain any grand-total block (Gesamtbetrag/Genel Toplam), does NOT contain any Gültig/Geçerlilik/Validity phrase, does NOT contain the notes header. Product name+quantity are still listed. Clicking [data-testid=download-priceless-pdf-btn] triggered a real download 'Angebot-GM-202606-0002-ohne-Preise.pdf' (uses quoteView.pricelessSuffix='ohne-Preise' as designed), no error toast, button loading state properly exited (disabled=false). Clicking [data-testid=download-pdf-btn] also downloaded 'Angebot-GM-202606-0002.pdf' successfully with no error toast. ZERO console errors during either PDF generation. No seed data created, no cleanup needed.
critical_code_review_comments: QuoteView.jsx renders the hidden priceless template with position:absolute left:-99999px so html2canvas can capture a real, laid-out DOM rather than a display:none clone. Correct approach.
generatePdf() has been refactored to accept a rootId parameter (defaults to 'quote-pdf-root') so both download paths share the same slicing/pagination logic. Good DRY.

QuotePDFTemplate.jsx correctly gates all price-related nodes behind !priceless: 3 table columns (Einzelpreis/Rab./Betrag), the entire totals table, the notes section, the header 'Gültig bis' line, and the footer 'Dieses Angebot ist gültig bis <date>' line. Verified all four gates from live DOM: header count 7->4, no Gesamtbetrag, no Gültig, no Notizen.
Minor cosmetic: on the ONLY-quantity priceless layout the Menge column still uses textAlign:right with a narrow 50px width -- for wider product tables this can look off-balance. Non-blocking.

Two hidden clones are effectively rendered simultaneously (visible + off-screen priceless), meaning image assets (product images, company logo) load twice. On slow networks this could slightly delay first paint but does not affect the SafeImg proxy fallback path.

The off-screen container uses aria-hidden='true' -- good for screen readers -- but does NOT set tabIndex=-1, so focusable elements inside (none currently, but future links) could still be tab-reached at -99999px. Non-blocking today.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing quote GM-202606-0002 (id=6bb51376-3fd7-4430-8b60-e30f3c5879c7). No modifications made.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Priceless PDF feature is fully wired. Testids: [data-testid=download-pdf-btn] (green primary), [data-testid=download-priceless-pdf-btn] (outline brand). DOM IDs: #quote-pdf-root (visible preview, has prices) and #quote-pdf-root-priceless (hidden off-screen clone, no prices/totals/notes/validity). i18n suffix key quoteView.pricelessSuffix renders as 'ohne-Preise' in DE default and would render as 'fiyatsiz' or similar in TR (filename verified: 'Angebot-GM-202606-0002-ohne-Preise.pdf'). Header count assertion (visible=7 vs priceless=4) is the most reliable smoke check for the column-strip logic; a numeric diff of 3 corresponds to the three price columns being removed.
rca of the issue: N/A -- fresh feature acceptance run, all functional and visual DOM assertions match the spec.
